prompt: WPA Federal Art Project poster style, 1930s American government art. A lone worker figure descends a steep mountain slope, moving deliberately downward toward a glowing valley below. The mountain has multiple ridges and valleys visible. The figure follows the steepest downward path. Bold flat areas of color with no gradients or shading. Strong diagonal composition. Limited palette: deep navy blue, burnt orange, cream white, forest green. Thick confident outlines. Heroic and determined mood. Silkscreen print texture. No text, no letters, no words, no labels anywhere in the image.
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color fills, bold diagonal composition, heroic solitary figure, silkscreen texture, limited 4-color palette — all authentic WPA grammar, not merely a vintage feel.
